title: Session handoff complete — Moonlit Drifting Nebula close
body: Session-handoff workflow (jc-session-handoff) executed end-to-end on 2026-05-03. Two phases landed this session: a471b66c (Practice-Core portability Rounds 1+2+3) and a3a0222a (observability multi-sink + fixtures plan WS1 RED phase). Branch is 30 commits ahead of origin/main, push pending owner authorisation per the broader 2026-05-02 owner roadmap. Continuity surfaces refreshed: repo-continuity.md (substantive landings, active-threads identity column for both touched threads, next safe step now points at WS2 sentry-node SinkRegistry consumption, deep consolidation status not due); observability-sentry-otel and agentic-engineering-enhancements next-session records (identity rows added with 92470a / 2026-05-03; observability gained a substantial session-close block detailing the WS1 estate, RED-arc skip register pointers, four-reviewer cross-confirmed fixes, and six deferred plan-body amendment candidates including the ADR-165 number collision); active plan frontmatter (WS0/WS1 status moved from pending to done, top-of-file Status moved from NOT STARTED to IN PROGRESS); pending-graduations register (WS8.6 ADR entry amended with the ADR-165 collision finding; two new entries: CHANGELOG / provenance attribution metadata carve-out, multi-commit-TDD-arc skip register pattern); napkin (added Four-reviewer cross-confirmation as scope-discipline tool + Sequential foreground after subagent timeouts entries); experience file 2026-05-03-moonlit-the-reviewer-chorus-carried-the-scope.md. No tactical track cards to resolve. No active claims to close (cleaned during the WS1 commit window). No conversations or escalations touched. Platform-specific entry-point sweep: CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md all at canonical-pointer shape; no drift. Hard gate verified: both touched threads have Moonlit Drifting Nebula / 92470a / 2026-05-03 identity rows. Next session enters WS2 with a working WS1 RED canary (runtime-fixture-tee-redaction.unit.test.ts) that will type-fail the moment WS2 deletes SENTRY_MODE from SentryConfigEnvironment.
